titleStmt.title: SII 41.31: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 31. (A.R. No. 30 of 1905.) Tiṇḍivaṉam, Tindivanam Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: Gōpura of the Tinṭriṇśvara temple, left of entrance.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Śrīranga I, Saka 1505, Subhānu, Vriśchika śu. 15 = 1583 November 20.

summary.p: The king Srirangayadēvamahārāya, son of Tirumalaidēva-mahārāya is described to have extracted tribute from Ceylon and to have reduced the troublesome Kaḷḷar and Maṟavar in Koṅgu and Malaināḍu and also to have bounteously given away elephants and pearls.

This records the gift of the proceeds (magamai) from the tolls levied on articles like paddy, sesamum, cotton (loose and spun), jaggery, cocoanuts etc., at stipulated rates per pack-load or head-load as the case may be, which are brought for sale in the (weekly) market fair on every Wednesday at Kiḍaṅgil. The gift was made by Śiṉṉa-Vīrappanāyakarayyaṉ, son of Pāppu-nāyakkarayyan of Vēlūr, who was the karttar of Kiḍaṇgil-paṟṟu and also by the heads of the merchant community called Āyirattu toḷḷāyiramudaligal, the Anbattāru dēśam and patineṇbūmi of Tiṇḍivaṉam, Pēṭṭai etc., for the tiruppaṇi (repairs) to the temple of Tiṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya Nāyiṉār, at Tiṇḍivaṉam, in Kiḍaṅgil-Paṟṟu, a sub-division of Paḍaivīḍu-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī . śrīmaṉ mahāmaṇṭalecura Ariyarāyavipāṭar pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭa
muvarāyakaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭukoṭātāṉ tulukkataḷa vipāṭaṉ tulukka
mokaran tavittāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum yiḻamu tiraikoṇṭa rācātirācaṉ rācaparamecuraṉ pūṟuvate
kṣaṇa paccima Uttiracatucamuttirātipatiyum koṅku malaināṭu Aṅkuḷḷa kaḷḷar maṟavar kuṟumpaṟuttu veḻamum
muttum vārivaḻaṅkum śrīvirapiṟatāpaṉ śrītirumalaitevamakārāyar kumārar śrīraṅkayatevamakārāyaṉ piṟutivi rā
cciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟttam 1000 5 100 5kkumel cellā niṉṟa cupānu camvassaram viṟuccika nāyaṟ
ṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu pañcamiyum comavaāramum rohaṇi nakṣattaramum peṟṟa nāḷ cantirakiri rācciyam mutalākiya pa
ṭaiviṭṭu rācciyattil kiṭaṅkil paṟṟil tiṇṭivaṉam tiṇṭicuramu^1^ṭaiyārkku Iṉṉā
ṭṭukku kaṟtarākiya velūr pāppu nāyakkarayyaṉ kumārar ciṉṉavirappa nāyakkarayyaṉum Āyirattu toḷḷā
yira mutalikaḷil talaivarānavarkaḷum tiṇṭivaṉam peṭṭai mutalākiya Aṉpattāṟu tecamum patiṉeṉpūmiyuḷḷa palarum
tiṇṭicuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil tiruppaṇikku makamai kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi [.] keṭaṅkil putaṉ kiḻamaic cantaiyil vaitta ka
ṭai Oṉṟukku kācu Araiyum nellup potikku kācu Oṉṟum Eḷḷup potikku kācuraṇṭum pañcup potikku kācu
raṇṭum Itil mārppu talaiccumaikku kācu Oṉṟum vellap potikku kācuraṇṭum teṅkāyp potikku kācu Oṉ
ṟum paḻap potikkum kācu Oṉṟum pākku miḷaku potikkum kācuraṇṭum Uppu potikku kācu Araiyum karuvā
ṭṭup potikkuk kācuraṇṭum piṭavaimāṟumulaikku paccavaṭam Añcukku kācu Oṉṟum pañcuttārukku
Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟum kappalccarakkukku paṇam pattukku kācu raṇṭum Intap paṭi makamai kaṭṭaḷaiyi
ṭṭom Inta makamaiyil Utaiyam koṇṭu tiṇṭicuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil tiruppaṇi naṭattak kaṭavatāka
vum Inta taṟmam Ācantirāṟkamāka paripālaṉam paṇṇi naṭattinaperkaḷ tevapatam coṟkapatam peṟakkaṭa
varākavum Itukku yātāmoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉāl keṅkai karaiyile kavilaip pacukkaḷaiyum tan
ṉiṭa mātāpitāvaiyum taṉkaiyālekoṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavarākavum §
sudattāt dviguṇam puṇyam paradattāndapānalam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattāt niṣṣamalam bhavet§ .
Digital edition of SII 41.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
